metadata.description: Multi-agent collaboration tasks for Article 5: Testing orchestration patterns (sequential, parallel, critic-in-loop)

queries.task: Research FastAPI dependency injection, write a 2-paragraph summary, then critique and refine the summary
queries.description: Simple sequential pipeline: research → write → critique → refine

queries.task: Compare React hooks vs class components. Have 3 specialists research different aspects (state, lifecycle, performance), then synthesize findings
queries.description: Parallel fan-out: 3 specialists work concurrently, synthesizer aggregates

queries.task: Explain Pydantic validators with code examples. Writer drafts, critic reviews quality, writer revises based on feedback (max 2 refinement rounds)
queries.description: Iterative refinement with quality gate (critic score >= 7/10 to pass)

queries.task: Research Spring Boot async patterns and FastAPI async patterns separately, identify similarities, and create unified best practices guide
queries.description: Dual research paths → synthesis with cross-framework insights

queries.task: Query database for all beginner-level docs, calculate total count, explain concepts from 3 randomly selected docs
3 agents each research a different framework (FastAPI, React, Spring). Voting: which has best async support? Provide evidence
queries.description: Parallel research → voting-based conflict resolution with justification

queries.task: Write tutorial on React useEffect. Critic reviews for clarity and completeness (score 1-10). If < 7, refine and resubmit
queries.description: Quality-gated refinement loop with numeric scoring

queries.task: Researcher finds FastAPI security best practices, writer creates guide, critic checks for completeness, writer adds missing pieces
queries.description: Extended sequential pipeline with feedback incorporation

queries.task: Parallel query: One agent counts Spring docs, another counts Pydantic docs, third counts FastAPI docs. Aggregator reports totals and percentages
queries.description: Simple parallel counting → aggregation with statistics

queries.task: Research GraphRAG concepts, write implementation guide with code, critic reviews technical accuracy (2 refinement rounds allowed)
queries.description: Research → technical writing → expert review → revision

queries.task: 2 agents propose different solutions for 'How to handle async errors in FastAPI?'. Supervisor reviews both and picks best approach
queries.description: Dual solution generation → hierarchical arbitration (supervisor decides)

queries.task: 3 specialists (frontend, backend, testing) each research React testing tools. Synthesizer creates comprehensive comparison table
